sentences.arabic: أَنْهَتْ مَيَّادَةُ الْعَمَلَ وَشَعَرَتْ بِتَعَبٍ شَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Mejjada je završila posao i osjetila se jako umornom.
sentences.translationEn: Mayyada finished work and felt very tired.

sentences.translation: Sjela je s kolegicom i pile su čaj.
sentences.translationEn: She sat with her colleague and they drank tea.

sentences.translation: Razgovarale su o svom danu i smijale se.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about their day and laughed.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ مَيَّادَةُ إِنَّ الْعَمَلَ أَسْهَلُ مَعَ أَصْدِقَاءَ جَيِّدِينَ.
sentences.translation: Mejjada je rekla da je posao lakši uz dobre prijatelje.
sentences.translationEn: Mayyada said that work is easier with good friends.
